title: platanthera orbiculata var. macrophylla
intro: Platanthera orbiculata var. macrophylla, also known as the green orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Platanthera orbiculata var. macrophylla include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The plant is often prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its rhizomes and roots are used in traditional herbal remedies.
